items.title: Campbell Historical Museum Open
items.location: 51 N Central Ave, Campbell, CA 95008, USA
items.description: The Campbell Historical Museum is open from 11-3pm. Please understand that the Museum is kept open by Volunteers. There are days when we do not have volunteers available to keep the museum open. And, on Fridays, the museum opens at 12 pm due to onsite Field Trips

items.title: The Ainsley House Open
items.description: The Ainsley House is Campbell's historic house museum that is open for docent-led tours. The Carriage House is the visitor center with a boutique and exhibits.

items.title: Infinity Dance Studio: Surf's Up, Dance On!
items.description: Infinity Dance Studio hosts an annual, two-day recital every year in June to showcase the talent and hard work of their students.

items.description: Join us this Father’s Day for a laid-back celebration at Cloud City Supply! We’re raising a glass to all the awesome dads out there with a free beer for every dad on us.

items.title: Downtown Campbell Weekly Farmers' Market
items.description: The Campbell Farmers' Market held on Sundays in Downtown Campbell is consistently rated as one of the best if not the best year-round Farmers' Markets in the South Bay. items.title: Emerald Summer Art Camp: Pottery, Painting, Sculpture, Mixed Media
items.description: Emerald Art Studio is offering summer camps. Each week features a unique theme, and campers will enjoy a variety of drawing, painting, and ceramics activities every day, keeping the experience engaging and inspiring throughout the summer.

Senior Transpsortation Symposium
items.description: Discover the many ways to get around your community with ease and confidence! This informative symposium is designed especially for older adults who want to explore convenient transportation options, save money on gas, and learn how to travel where they need to go.

2026 Campbell Summer Concert Series
items.description: The Campbell Summer Concert series is back for a full eight concert season in 2026 with a blend of old favorites and some acts that are new to the Campbell Summer Concert Series.

items.title: Sonic Addiction at 2026 Campbell Summer Concert Series
items.description: Sonic Addiction covers some of your favorite party tunes from any and every decade. From The Beatles and James Brown to No Doubt and P!nk. The classic rock, 80's and dance tunes that are great for both private and public events.

items.title: Watercolor Painting 4-Week Class for Beginners
items.description: Led by a professional artist, this class breaks watercolor into approachable steps from brush handling and washes to techniques like wet-on-wet and dry brushing. You'll work on how to bring softness and clarity into your art.

items.description: The Floorshakers’ music spans generations - from classic Funk and Soul favorites to modern dance hits, Rock anthems, Motown, R&B, and party classics - all performed with energy, style, and professionalism.

items.title: Family Fun Friday at the Campbell Historical Museum
items.description: Bring the kids and get creative at Family Fun Friday! Join us at the Campbell Historical Museum for a day of free, hands-on crafts. Drop in anytime to explore, create, and have fun together - no registration needed. It’s a perfect way to spark curiosity and make history!
items.source: Campbell Museums Events + Downtown Campbell Events

items.title: Free Museum Day at the Campbell Historical Museum & Ainsley House

items.title: San Benito County Line Band at 2026 Campbell Summer Concert Series
items.description: SBCL is a talented country band that blends classic country roots with today’s chart-topping hits. From honky-tonk anthems to contemporary country jams, SBCL knows how to keep the energy high and the crowd on their feet.

items.title: Night at the Museum, An Adult Hands on Experience!
items.description: Experience this adults-only social night featuring wine, mocktails, and a rare look at artifacts usually kept behind the scenes. Mix and mingle with fellow history enthusiasts as you test your knowledge with Valley trivia, get creative, and visit our Museum Mystic Tarot Card Read

items.title: Get Lucky (Band) at 2026 Campbell Summer Concert Series
items.description: From the newest chart-toppers you hear on the radio to classic old-school hits, we've got your playlist covered. Get Lucky plays all the top hits from the 70's, 80's, and 90's, but we specialize in electrifying covers and mashups of songs from the 2000's to today.

items.title: The History of Baseball, America's Favorite Pastime, with Dr. Lindsay Bell
items.description: Celebrate America's 250th anniversary with a look at the game that helped define a nation. Join historian Dr. Lindsay Bell on July 31 as he explores how baseball evolved from a simple pastime into a powerful reflection of American culture, identity, and history.
items.source: Campbell Museums Events + Downtown Campbell Events

items.title: West Valley College Multi-Chamber Morning Mixer
San Jose Rocks! The History of Rock Music in the Santa Clara Valley with Dan Orloff
items.description: From garage bands to legendary venues, the Santa Clara Valley has a rich rock-and-roll history that's often overlooked. Join local music historian Dan Orloff as he explores the artists, concerts, clubs, and cultural moments that helped shape the South Bay's vibrant music scene.

items.title: Campbell Relay for Life 2026
items.description: Fighting cancer takes many things like research, free rides to chemo and lodging near hospitals, and our 24/7 helpline. But we can’t do any of that without you. Join Relay For Life, the largest, most inspiring, and supportive cancer fundraising event on the planet.
